name: io.github.Ipayx-stellar/fx-audit
title: iPayX FX Audit
description: Forensic FX audit. Detects hidden bank markups in real time. Returns spread bps + audit score 1-10.

tools.name: check_fx_rate
tools.description: Get live mid-market FX rate for any currency pair. Free, no auth required.

tools.name: audit_transaction
tools.description: Audit a single FX transaction. Returns spread bps, hidden cost, and FX Score 0-10. 3 free/month per API key, then 402.

tools.name: full_forensic_report
tools.description: Generate a full HTML forensic report on a batch of FX transactions. Paid tool — requires active subscription.

tools.name: compare_fx_sources
tools.description: Compare FX rates across multiple market sources (Twelve Data, OXR, Perplexity Sonar). Paid tool.
